en.extract:
Cassin's spinetail (Neafrapus cassini) is a species of swift in the family Apodidae.
It is found throughout the African tropical rainforest (including Bioko).

'''Cassin's spinetail''' ('''''Neafrapus cassini''''') is a species of [[Swift (bird)|swift]] in the family [[Apodidae]].
It is found throughout the [[Tropical forest|African tropical rainforest]] (including [[Bioko]]).
